# @byted-service/singleflight

[![bnpm](https://web-bnpm.byted.org/badge/v/@byted-service/singleflight.svg?style=flat-square)](https://web-bnpm.byted.org/package/@byted-service/singleflight) [![download](https://2y8ngapf.fn.bytedance.net/d?p=@byted-service/singleflight)](https://web-bnpm.byted.org/package/@byted-service/singleflight)

[简体中文](https://code.byted.org/nodejs/byted-service/blob/master/packages/singleflight/README.md) | [English](https://code.byted.org/nodejs/byted-service/blob/master/packages/singleflight/README.en.md) | [CHANGELOG](https://code.byted.org/nodejs/byted-service/blob/master/packages/singleflight/CHANGELOG.md)

缓存指定函数返回的 promise，等待 promise 返回结果，同一个 key 只有一个在等待返回结果的 promise。

## 安装

```sh
npm install @byted-service/singleflight --registry=http://bnpm.byted.org
```

## 使用方法

```ts
import Singleflight from '@byted-service/singleflight';
import { assert } from 'console';

const returnPromiseResolve = (ms: number, res: number) => {
    return new Promise<typeof res>(resolve => {
        setTimeout(() => {
            resolve(res);
        }, ms);
    });
};

const sf = new Singleflight<T>();

const res = await Promise.all([
    sf.do('key', () => {
        return returnPromiseResolve(10, 10);
    }),
    sf.do('key', () => {
        return returnPromiseResolve(10, 15);
    })
]);

console.log(res[0], res[1]);

assert(res[0] === res[1], 'invoke do error');
```

## API

### Singleflight\<T\>(options:{ cacheOptions?:LruCache.Options}={})

-   `options`
    -   `cacheOptions` [可选] 参考 https://github.com/isaacs/node-lru-cache#options

### do(key:string,fn:()=>Promise\<T\>):Promise\<T\>

-   `key` 用以缓存的 key
-   `fn` 返回需要缓存的 promise。
